---
title: "CellChat Analysis Report"
params:
  file: NULL
output:
  html_document:
    theme:
      version: 5
      bootswatch: lumen
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
runtime: shiny
---

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
library(CellChat)
library(patchwork)
library(downloadthis)
```

# Introduction
This report presents a comprehensive analysis of cell–cell communication using the CellChat package. Each section includes visualizations and tables to illustrate key interaction patterns and signaling changes between groups.

```{r load-cellchat, results='hide'}
cellchat_list <- readRDS(params$file)

cellchat <- mergeCellChat(cellchat_list, add.names = names(cellchat_list), cell.prefix = TRUE)

cellchat_list <- lapply(cellchat_list, netAnalysis_computeCentrality)

# cellchat <- readRDS(params$merged_file)
```

<!-- # Interaction Comparison {.tabset} -->
<!-- We compare the number of interactions and the interaction weights between two experimental groups. -->

<!-- ## Total number of interactions -->
<!-- ```{r compare-count} -->
<!-- selectInput( -->
<!--   'measure', label = 'Number of bins:', -->
<!--   choices = c("count","weight"), selected = "count" -->
<!-- ) -->
<!-- renderPlot({ -->
<!--   compareInteractions(cellchat, show.legend = FALSE, group = c(1, 2), measure = input$measure) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- #plot(gg1) -->
<!-- ``` -->

# Total number of interactions

<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
    
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
    gg1 <- compareInteractions(cellchat, show.legend=FALSE, group=c(1,2))
    gg1
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_this(
  gg1,
  output_name = "cellchat_interactions",
  output_extension = ".pdf",
  button_label = "Download PDF",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
)

download_this(
  gg1,
  output_name = "cellchat_interactions",
  output_extension = ".svg",
  button_label = "Download SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
)
```
  </div>

  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
gg2 <- compareInteractions(cellchat, show.legend=FALSE, group=c(1,2), measure="weight")
print(gg2)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_this(
  gg2,
  output_name = "cellchat_interactions_weight",
  output_extension = ".pdf",
  button_label = "Download PDF",
  button_type = "default",
  has_icon = TRUE,
  icon = "fa fa-save"
)

download_this(
  gg2,
  output_name = "cellchat_interactions_weight",
  output_extension = ".svg",
  button_label = "Download SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  has_icon = TRUE,
  icon = "fa fa-save"
)
```
  </div>
</div>

# Number of interactions and interaction strength among different cell populations {.tabset}

This section visualizes differences in network structure between groups using raw counts and weighted measures.

## Circle Plot across two datasets

<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">

```{r diff-count, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
p1 <- netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "count", margin = 0)
print(p1)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
tmp_pdf <- "circleplot_interaction_count.pdf"
pdf(tmp_pdf,
    width  = 8,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7
    )
replayPlot(p1)
invisible(dev.off())

download_file(
  path           = "circleplot_interaction_count.pdf",
  output_name      = "circleplot_interaction_count",
  button_label     = "Download PDF",
  button_type      = "default",
  self_contained   = FALSE
)

tmp_svg <- "circleplot_interaction_count.svg"
svg(tmp_svg,
    width  = 8,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7)
replayPlot(p1)
invisible(dev.off())

download_file(
  path           = "circleplot_interaction_count.svg",
  output_name      = "circleplot_interaction_count",
  button_label     = "Download SVG",
  button_type      = "default",
  self_contained   = FALSE
)

```
  </div>

  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
p2 <- netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, weight.scale = TRUE, measure = "weight", margin = 0)
print(p2)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
tmp_pdf2 <- "circleplot_interaction_weight.pdf"
pdf(tmp_pdf2,
    width  = 8 ,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7)
replayPlot(p2)
invisible(dev.off())

download_file(
  path           = "circleplot_interaction_weight.pdf",
  output_name      = "circleplot_interaction_weight",
  button_label     = "Download PDF",
  button_type      = "default",
  self_contained   = FALSE
)

tmp_svg2 <- "circleplot_interaction_weight.svg"
svg(tmp_svg2,
    width  = 8,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7)
replayPlot(p2)
invisible(dev.off())

download_file(
  path           = "circleplot_interaction_weight.svg",
  output_name      = "circleplot_interaction_weight",
  button_label     = "Download SVG",
  button_type      = "default",
  self_contained   = FALSE
)

```
  </div>
</div>

## Heatmap across two datasets
We generate circle plots of interaction networks for each sample in the provided list. The dot sizes are scaled by the maximum interaction weight.

<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">

```{r diff-heatmap, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
library(ComplexHeatmap)

h1 <- netVisual_heatmap(cellchat, measure = "count")
print(h1)
pdf("diff_heatmap_count.pdf",
    width  = 7,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 6)      # res    = 300
ComplexHeatmap::draw(h1)
invisible(dev.off())

svg("diff_heatmap_count.svg",
    width  = 7,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 6)
ComplexHeatmap::draw(h1)
invisible(dev.off())
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_file(
  path        = "diff_heatmap_count.pdf",
  output_name = "diff_heatmap_count",
  button_label = "Download\nPDF",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)

download_file(
  path        = "diff_heatmap_count.svg",
  output_name = "diff_heatmap_count",
  button_label = "Download \n SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)
```
  </div>

  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
```{r diff-heatmap-weight, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
h2 <- netVisual_heatmap(cellchat, measure = "weight")
print(h2)
# png("diff_heatmap_weight.png",
#     width  = 8 * 300,   # 8" × 300 dpi
#     height = 6 * 300,
#     res    = 300)
# ComplexHeatmap::draw(h2)
# invisible(dev.off())

pdf("diff_heatmap_weight.pdf",
    width  = 8,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7)
ComplexHeatmap::draw(h2)
invisible(dev.off())

svg("diff_heatmap_weight.svg",
    width  = 8,   # 8" × 300 dpi
    height = 7)
ComplexHeatmap::draw(h2)
invisible(dev.off())

```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_file(
  path        = "diff_heatmap_weight.pdf",
  output_name = "diff_heatmap_weight",
  button_label = "Download \n PDF",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)

download_file(
  path        = "diff_heatmap_weight.svg",
  output_name = "diff_heatmap_weight",
  button_label = "Download \n SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)

```
  </div>
</div>

## Between experimental groups
 
<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
  
```{r circle-plot-1, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# object.list <- setNames(list(cellchat.NL, cellchat.LS), c(s1, s2))
object.list <- cellchat_list
# compute max weight once
weight.max <- getMaxWeight(object.list, attribute = c("idents", "count"))

# render & save first plot

nc1<-netVisual_circle(
  object.list[[1]]@net$count,
  weight.scale    = TRUE,
  label.edge      = FALSE,
  edge.weight.max = weight.max[2],
  edge.width.max  = 12,
  title.name      = paste0("Number of interactions – ", names(object.list)[1])
)
# png("circle_plot_1.png",
#     width  = 8 * 300,
#     height = 6 * 300,
#     res    = 300)
# 
# replayPlot(nc1)
# 
# invisible(dev.off())

pdf("circle_plot_1.pdf",
    width  = 8,
    height = 7)

replayPlot(nc1)

invisible(dev.off())

svg("circle_plot_1.svg",
    width  = 8,
    height = 7)

replayPlot(nc1)

invisible(dev.off())
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_file(
  path           = "circle_plot_1.pdf",
  output_name    = "circle_plot_1",
  button_label   = "Download PDF",
  button_type    = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)

download_file(
  path           = "circle_plot_1.svg",
  output_name    = "circle_plot_1",
  button_label   = "Download SVG",
  button_type    = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)
```
  </div>
  
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
```{r circle-plot-2, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
# reuse same max weight
weight.max <- getMaxWeight(object.list, attribute = c("idents", "count"))

# render & save second plot
nc2<-netVisual_circle(
  object.list[[2]]@net$count,
  weight.scale    = TRUE,
  label.edge      = FALSE,
  edge.weight.max = weight.max[2],
  edge.width.max  = 12,
  title.name      = paste0("Number of interactions – ", names(object.list)[2])
)
# png("circle_plot_2.png",
#     width  = 8 * 300,
#     height = 6 * 300,
#     res    = 300)
# 
# replayPlot(nc2)
# 
# invisible(dev.off())

pdf("circle_plot_2.pdf",
    width  = 8,
    height = 7)

replayPlot(nc2)

invisible(dev.off())

svg("circle_plot_2.svg",
    width  = 8,
    height = 7)

replayPlot(nc2)

invisible(dev.off())
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
download_file(
  path           = "circle_plot_2.pdf",
  output_name    = "circle_plot_2",
  button_label   = "Download PDF",
  button_type    = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)

download_file(
  path           = "circle_plot_2.svg",
  output_name    = "circle_plot_2",
  button_label   = "Download SVG",
  button_type    = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE
)
```

  </div>
</div>


## Circle plots for selected cell types {.tabset}

```{r selectinput}

selectizeInput(
  inputId  = "levels",
  label    = "Cell types (select up to three):",
  choices  = levels(cellchat@idents$joint),
  selected = levels(cellchat@idents$joint)[1:3],
  multiple = TRUE,
  options  = list(maxItems = 3)
)

```

### Between experimental groups

We merge interactions by major cell-type groups and visualize combined networks.

```{r data-process}

tagList(
  div(class = "row",
    lapply(seq_along(object.list), function(i) {
      div(class = "col-md-6",
        # Plot output
        plotOutput(outputId = paste0("mergedPlot_", i), height = "400px"),
        # Small spacer
        tags$br(),
        # Download button
        div(class = "text-center",
          downloadButton(
            outputId = paste0("download_pdf_", i),
            label    = "Download PDF"
          ),
          downloadButton(
            outputId = paste0("download_svg_", i),
            label    = "Download SVG"
          )
        ),
        # Add some bottom margin so rows don't stick together
        style = "margin-bottom: 30px;"
      )
    })
  )
)

```


```{r vis}
grp <- reactive({
  req(input$levels)
  factor(rep(input$levels, each = 4), levels = input$levels)
})
mergedList <- reactive({
  lapply(object.list, mergeInteractions, grp())
})
wmax <- reactive({
  getMaxWeight(
    mergedList(),
    slot.name   = c("idents", "net", "net"),
    attribute   = c("idents", "count", "count.merged")
  )
})

# 2) Loop to auto‐wire each plot + download
invisible(
  lapply(seq_along(object.list), function(i) {
    local({
      idx <- i
      nm  <- names(object.list)[idx]
  
      # render the circle plot
      output[[paste0("mergedPlot_", idx)]] <- renderPlot({
        netVisual_circle(
          mergedList()[[idx]]@net$count.merged,
          weight.scale     = TRUE,
          label.edge       = TRUE,
          edge.weight.max  = wmax()[3],
          edge.width.max   = 12,
          title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", nm)
        )
      })
  
      # download handler for that same plot
      output[[paste0("download_pdf_", idx)]] <- downloadHandler(
        filename = function() {
          paste0("circle_plot_", nm, "_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf")
        },
        content = function(file) {
          pdf(file, width = 6, height = 5)
          netVisual_circle(
            mergedList()[[idx]]@net$count.merged,
            weight.scale     = TRUE,
            label.edge       = TRUE,
            edge.weight.max  = wmax()[3],
            edge.width.max   = 12,
            title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", nm)
          )
          dev.off()
        },
        contentType = "application/pdf"
      )
      
      output[[paste0("download_svg_", idx)]] <- downloadHandler(
        filename = function() {
          paste0("circle_plot_", nm, "_", Sys.Date(), ".svg")
        },
        content = function(file) {
          svg(file, width = 6, height = 5)
          netVisual_circle(
            mergedList()[[idx]]@net$count.merged,
            weight.scale     = TRUE,
            label.edge       = TRUE,
            edge.weight.max  = wmax()[3],
            edge.width.max   = 12,
            title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", nm)
          )
          dev.off()
        },
        contentType = NA
      )
    })
  })
)


```

```{r merge-interactions}
# mergedCellchat <- reactiveVal(NULL)
# 
# plotOutput("mergedPlots", height = "400px")
# 
# # --- Server logic ----
# output$mergedPlots <- renderPlot({
#   # ensure inputs are available
#   req(input$levels, 4)
#   
#   # build the grouping factor
#   grp <- factor(
#     rep(input$levels, each = 4),
#     levels = input$levels
#   )
#   
#   # merge interactions on the fly
#   merged.list <- lapply(object.list, function(x) {
#     mergeInteractions(x, grp)
#   })
#   
#   # (re‐)build the combined CellChat if you need it later
#   cellchat.m <<- mergeCellChat(merged.list, add.names = names(merged.list))
#   mergedCellchat(cellchat.m)
#   # compute the max weight for scaling
#   wmax <- getMaxWeight(
#     merged.list,
#     slot.name = c("idents","net","net"),
#     attribute = c("idents","count","count.merged")
#   )
#   
#   netVisual_circle(
#       merged.list[[1]]@net$count.merged,
#       weight.scale     = TRUE,
#       label.edge       = TRUE,
#       edge.weight.max  = wmax[3],
#       edge.width.max   = 12,
#       title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", names(merged.list)[i])
#   )
#   
#   
# })
# 
# downloadButton("download_plots_pdf", "Download All Plots as PDF")
# 
# output$download_plots_pdf <- downloadHandler(
#   filename = function() {
#     paste0("circle_plots_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf")
#   },
#   content = function(file) {
#     req(input$pathway_circle)
#     # open PDF device
#     pdf(file, width = 6, height = 5)
#     # draw one page per pathway
#     netVisual_circle(
#         merged.list[[1]]@net$count.merged,
#         weight.scale     = TRUE,
#         label.edge       = TRUE,
#         edge.weight.max  = wmax[3],
#         edge.width.max   = 12,
#         title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", names(merged.list)[i])
#     )
#     dev.off()
#   },
#   contentType = "application/pdf"
# )
# 
# # Second plot
# mergedCellchat <- reactiveVal(NULL)
# 
# plotOutput("mergedPlots2", height = "400px")
# 
# # --- Server logic ----
# output$mergedPlots2 <- renderPlot({
#   # ensure inputs are available
#   req(input$levels, 4)
#   
#   # build the grouping factor
#   grp <- factor(
#     rep(input$levels, each = 4),
#     levels = input$levels
#   )
#   
#   # merge interactions on the fly
#   merged.list <- lapply(object.list, function(x) {
#     mergeInteractions(x, grp)
#   })
#   
#   # (re‐)build the combined CellChat if you need it later
#   cellchat.m <<- mergeCellChat(merged.list, add.names = names(merged.list))
#   mergedCellchat(cellchat.m)
#   # compute the max weight for scaling
#   wmax <- getMaxWeight(
#     merged.list,
#     slot.name = c("idents","net","net"),
#     attribute = c("idents","count","count.merged")
#   )
#   
#   netVisual_circle(
#       merged.list[[2]]@net$count.merged,
#       weight.scale     = TRUE,
#       label.edge       = TRUE,
#       edge.weight.max  = wmax[3],
#       edge.width.max   = 12,
#       title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", names(merged.list)[i])
#   )
#   
#   
# })
# 
# downloadButton("download_plots_pdf2", "Download All Plots as PDF")
# 
# output$download_plots_pdf2 <- downloadHandler(
#   filename = function() {
#     paste0("circle_plots_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf")
#   },
#   content = function(file) {
#     req(input$pathway_circle)
#     # open PDF device
#     pdf(file, width = 6, height = 5)
#     # draw one page per pathway
#     netVisual_circle(
#         merged.list[[2]]@net$count.merged,
#         weight.scale     = TRUE,
#         label.edge       = TRUE,
#         edge.weight.max  = wmax[3],
#         edge.width.max   = 12,
#         title.name       = paste0("Merged interactions – ", names(merged.list)[i])
#     )
#     dev.off()
#   },
#   contentType = "application/pdf"
# )

```

### Merged analysis

We highlight changes in merged interaction networks between conditions.

```{r diff-merged}
# renderPlot({
#   par(mfrow = c(1, 2), xpd = TRUE)
# 
#   netVisual_diffInteraction(
#     mergedCellchat(),
#     weight.scale = TRUE,
#     measure = "count.merged",
#     label.edge = TRUE
#   )
#   
#   netVisual_diffInteraction(
#     mergedCellchat(),
#     weight.scale = TRUE,
#     measure = "weight.merged",
#     label.edge = TRUE
#   )
# })

tagList(
  div(class = "row",
    # Count–merged plot + download
    div(class = "col-md-6",
      plotOutput("mergedDiff_count", height = "400px"),
      tags$br(),
      div(class = "text-center",
        downloadButton("download_diff_count_pdf", "Download PDF"),
        downloadButton("download_diff_count_svg", "Download SVG")
      ),
      style = "margin-bottom: 30px;"
    ),
    # Weight–merged plot + download
    div(class = "col-md-6",
      plotOutput("mergedDiff_weight", height = "400px"),
      tags$br(),
      div(class = "text-center",
        downloadButton("download_diff_weight_pdf", "Download PDF"),
        downloadButton("download_diff_weight_svg", "Download SVG")
      ),
      style = "margin-bottom: 30px;"
    )
  )
)

mergedCellchat <- reactiveVal(NULL)
observe({
  req(input$levels)
  grp <- factor(rep(input$levels, each = 4), levels = input$levels)
  merged.list <- lapply(object.list, mergeInteractions, grp)
  cellchat.m <- mergeCellChat(merged.list, add.names = names(merged.list))
  mergedCellchat(cellchat.m)
})

# 1) Count–merged plot
output$mergedDiff_count <- renderPlot({
  req(mergedCellchat())
  netVisual_diffInteraction(
    mergedCellchat(),
    weight.scale = TRUE,
    measure      = "count.merged",
    label.edge   = TRUE
  )
})
output$download_diff_count_pdf <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() paste0("diff_count_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"),
  content = function(file) {
    pdf(file, width = 6, height = 5)
    netVisual_diffInteraction(
      mergedCellchat(),
      weight.scale = TRUE,
      measure      = "count.merged",
      label.edge   = TRUE
    )
    dev.off()
  },
  contentType = "application/pdf"
)

output$download_diff_count_svg <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() paste0("diff_count_", Sys.Date(), ".svg"),
  content = function(file) {
    svg(file, width = 6, height = 5)
    netVisual_diffInteraction(
      mergedCellchat(),
      weight.scale = TRUE,
      measure      = "count.merged",
      label.edge   = TRUE
    )
    dev.off()
  },
  contentType = NA
)

# 2) Weight–merged plot
output$mergedDiff_weight <- renderPlot({
  req(mergedCellchat())
  netVisual_diffInteraction(
    mergedCellchat(),
    weight.scale = TRUE,
    measure      = "weight.merged",
    label.edge   = TRUE
  )
})

output$download_diff_weight_pdf <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() paste0("diff_weight_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"),
  content = function(file) {
    pdf(file, width = 6, height = 5)
    netVisual_diffInteraction(
      mergedCellchat(),
      weight.scale = TRUE,
      measure      = "weight.merged",
      label.edge   = TRUE
    )
    dev.off()
  },
  contentType = "application/pdf"
)

output$download_diff_weight_svg <- downloadHandler(
  filename = function() paste0("diff_weight_", Sys.Date(), ".svg"),
  content = function(file) {
    svg(file, width = 6, height = 5)
    netVisual_diffInteraction(
      mergedCellchat(),
      weight.scale = TRUE,
      measure      = "weight.merged",
      label.edge   = TRUE
    )
    dev.off()
  },
  contentType = NA
)
```

# Compare the major sources and targets in a 2D space {.tabset}

Scatter plots identify major signaling senders and receivers across datasets.

## Cell populations with significant changes between conditions

```{r signaling-role, fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
# num.link <- sapply(object.list, function(x) {
#   rowSums(x@net$count) + colSums(x@net$count) - diag(x@net$count)
# })
# weight.MinMax <- c(min(num.link), max(num.link))
# gg <- lapply(seq_along(object.list), function(i) {
#   netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(
#     object.list[[i]],
#     title = names(object.list)[i],
#     weight.MinMax = weight.MinMax
#   )
# })
# patchwork::wrap_plots(plots = gg)


num.link     <- sapply(object.list, function(x) {
  rowSums(x@net$count) + colSums(x@net$count) - diag(x@net$count)
})
weight.MinMax <- c(min(num.link), max(num.link))
gg <- lapply(seq_along(object.list), function(i) {
  netAnalysis_signalingRole_scatter(
    object.list[[i]],
    title         = names(object.list)[i],
    weight.MinMax = weight.MinMax
  )
})

```

<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">

```{r, scatter-plots-1, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}

gg[[1]]

download_this(
  gg[[1]],
  output_name = paste0("scatter_pdf_", 1),
  output_extension = ".pdf",    
  button_label = "Download PDF",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
)

download_this(
  gg[[1]],
  output_name = paste0("scatter_svg_", 1),
  output_extension = ".svg",    
  button_label = "Download SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
)

```

  </div>

  <div style="width:48%; text-align:center;">
  
```{r, scatter-plots-2, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}

gg[[2]]

download_this(
  gg[[2]],
  output_name = paste0("scatter_pdf_", 2),
  output_extension = ".pdf",    
  button_label = "Download PDF",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
)

download_this(
  gg[[2]],
  output_name = paste0("scatter_svg_", 2),
  output_extension = ".svg",    
  button_label = "Download SVG",
  button_type = "default",
  self_contained = FALSE,
  ggsave_args = list(width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 300)
)

```

  </div>
</div>


<!-- ## Differential Signaling Changes {.tabset} -->

<!-- We assess changes in incoming and outgoing signaling for selected cell types. -->

<!-- ## Inflam. DC -->

<!-- ```{r signaling-changes-dc} -->

<!-- gg1 <- netAnalysis_signalingChanges_scatter( -->

<!--   cellchat, -->

<!--   idents.use = "Inflam. DC", -->

<!--   signaling.exclude = "MIF" -->

<!-- ) -->

<!-- patchwork::wrap_plots(plots = gg1) -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## cDC1 -->

<!-- ```{r signaling-changes-cdc1} -->

<!-- gg2 <- netAnalysis_signalingChanges_scatter( -->

<!--   cellchat, -->

<!--   idents.use = "cDC1", -->

<!--   signaling.exclude = c("MIF") -->

<!-- ) -->

<!-- patchwork::wrap_plots(plots = gg2) -->

<!-- ``` -->

## Signalling changes of specific cell populations

```{r signaling-changes-tabs, echo=FALSE}
# 1) UI: selection + placeholder for our tab panel
selectInput(
  inputId  = "idents_use",
  label    = "Select cell types:",
  choices  = levels(cellchat@idents$joint),
  selected = levels(cellchat@idents$joint)[1:3],
  multiple = TRUE
)
uiOutput("signalingTabs")

# 2) Server: build tabs with plot + download buttons
output$signalingTabs <- renderUI({
  req(input$idents_use)
  
  tabs <- lapply(input$idents_use, function(id) {
    safe_id   <- make.names(id)
    plot_name <- paste0("sigPlot_", safe_id)
    pdf_btn   <- paste0("dl_pdf_", safe_id)
    svg_btn   <- paste0("dl_svg_", safe_id)
    
    tabPanel(
      title = id,
      # plot placeholder
      plotOutput(plot_name, height = "400px"),
      
      # centered download buttons
      tags$div(
        style = "text-align: center; margin-top: 8px;",
        downloadButton(pdf_btn, "Download PDF"),
        downloadButton(svg_btn, "Download SVG")
      )
    )
  })
  
  do.call(tabsetPanel, c(id = "tabs", tabs))
})

# 3) Server: render plots and wire up downloadHandlers
observeEvent(input$idents_use, {
  lapply(input$idents_use, function(id) {
    local({
      this_id   <- id
      safe_id   <- make.names(this_id)
      plot_name <- paste0("sigPlot_", safe_id)
      pdf_btn   <- paste0("dl_pdf_", safe_id)
      svg_btn   <- paste0("dl_svg_", safe_id)
      
      # render the plot
      output[[plot_name]] <- renderPlot({
        netAnalysis_signalingChanges_scatter(
          mergedCellchat(),
          dot.size          = 5,
          label.size        = 4,
          font.size         = 13,
          font.size.title   = 13,
          idents.use        = this_id,
          signaling.exclude = "MIF"
        ) %>% wrap_plots()
      })
      
      # PDF download handler
      output[[pdf_btn]] <- downloadHandler(
        filename = function() paste0("SignalingChanges_", this_id, ".pdf"),
        content  = function(file) {
          ggsave(
            filename = file,
            plot     = netAnalysis_signalingChanges_scatter(
              mergedCellchat(),
              dot.size          = 5,
              label.size        = 4,
              font.size         = 13,
              font.size.title   = 13,
              idents.use        = this_id,
              signaling.exclude = "MIF"
            ) %>% wrap_plots(),
            device   = "pdf",
            width    = 10,
            height   = 6
          )
        }
      )
      
      # PNG download handler
      output[[svg_btn]] <- downloadHandler(
        filename = function() paste0("SignalingChanges_", this_id, ".svg"),
        content  = function(file) {
          ggsave(
            filename = file,
            plot     = netAnalysis_signalingChanges_scatter(
              mergedCellchat(),
              dot.size          = 5,
              label.size        = 4,
              font.size         = 13,
              font.size.title   = 13,
              idents.use        = this_id,
              signaling.exclude = "MIF"
            ) %>% wrap_plots(),
            device   = "svg",
            dpi      = 300,
            width    = 10,
            height   = 6
          )
        }
      )
      
    })
  })
})
```
